title: elsholtzia major
intro: Elsholtzia major, also known as Vietnamese balm or Vietnamese mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which help to alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Elsholtzia major include its ability to reduce fever, relieve headaches and body aches, and promote digestion. Elsholtzia major can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese and Vietnamese medicine.
